confidence.explanation: Primary gap: no read-only API endpoint to directly verify payment_types_tbl contents. ACCOUNT is completely absent from the frontend JS bundle, which is a concern but may be by design (DB-only ticket; UI integration is INV-605's scope). BALANCE is referenced in frontend for manual entries. All app API calls returned 200. DB migration state cannot be confirmed via UI/API alone.

test_cases.title: Verify ACCOUNT payment type present via live API
test_cases.note: ACCOUNT is completely absent from the frontend JS bundle (index-B0E7Y5i9.js). No existing SO transactions use ACCOUNT across bookings 7-11. No read-only endpoint to directly list payment_types_tbl entries. Cannot confirm ACCOUNT migration ran without destructive write test or direct DB access. Recommend verifying via DB query or POST /so/lineitem with ACCOUNT payment type on a test booking.

test_cases.title: Verify BALANCE payment type present via live API
test_cases.note: BALANCE IS referenced in the frontend JS bundle — used as payment_type='BALANCE' for Manual transaction entries. The frontend expects BALANCE to be valid in the DB. However, no SO transactions exist yet that use BALANCE, and no read-only listing endpoint confirms DB presence. Confidence is higher than ACCOUNT since the frontend actively uses BALANCE. Recommend verifying via POST /so/lineitem with Manual type or DB query.

test_cases.title: Verify Payment Type UI on Reservation Details surfaces ACCOUNT and BALANCE
test_cases.note: The Payments tab shows 5 hardcoded options: Credit Card, Cash, Debit Card, Cheque, Interac. ACCOUNT and BALANCE are NOT visible as user-selectable payment methods. BALANCE is programmatically used for Manual entries (not a user-visible option). ACCOUNT is entirely absent from the frontend. This is likely expected behavior — INV-622 is a DB-layer ticket and INV-605 (Reservation Details - Payment Tab - API Integration) covers UI integration.

test_cases.title: Console error scan
test_cases.note: Only 1 error: Cognito auth server favicon.ico 404 — allowlisted as third-party noise. No app console errors.

test_cases.title: Network error scan
test_cases.note: All 5 app-authored API requests returned 200. No 4xx/5xx responses.

test_cases.title: Broken image / asset scan
test_cases.note: No broken assets detected in the app. Asset report is empty (no non-200 responses).

test_cases.title: Document lifecycle smoke
test_cases.note: Exempt: seed-data/enum ticket has no document create/edit surface. See manual/TC-UV-4/exemption.md

test_cases.title: Accessibility scan
test_cases.note: axe-core/playwright not available in current headless MCP environment. No serious/critical violations observed manually.

test_cases.title: Snapshot drift check
test_cases.note: Exempt: no baseline-stable run exists for INV-622. First run for this ticket.

key_findings: CRITICAL: ACCOUNT payment type is completely absent from the frontend JS bundle (index-B0E7Y5i9.js). This means the frontend has no awareness of ACCOUNT whatsoever.
BALANCE is present in the frontend bundle — hardcoded as the payment_type for Manual transaction entries.
The Payments tab UI shows 5 hardcoded methods (Credit Card, Cash, Debit Card, Cheque, Interac) — no dynamic loading from payment_types_tbl.
No read-only API endpoint exists to list all payment_types_tbl entries. Direct DB verification blocked.
Existing SO transactions use CREDIT_CARD (id=1) and CASH (id=3). No ACCOUNT or BALANCE transactions found.
All app API calls returned 200. No console errors from app code. No network errors.
INV-605 (Reservation Details - Payment Tab - API Integration) is the upstream ticket that would wire up ACCOUNT/BALANCE in the UI.
recommendations: Verify ACCOUNT and BALANCE exist in payment_types_tbl via direct DB query: SELECT * FROM payment_types_tbl WHERE name IN ('ACCOUNT', 'BALANCE')
Or create a test SO line item with ACCOUNT payment type on a disposable seed booking to verify API accepts it
If ACCOUNT is confirmed in DB but absent from ORM, raise as a defect against INV-599 or INV-622
Block INV-605 (Payment Tab UI Integration) until DB seed data is confirmed to ensure ACCOUNT and BALANCE will work end-to-end
